description: Simulator-first perception, action planning, execution feedback, and safety-gated robotics tasks.

verifier.pass_signal: simulated plan reaches goal without safety violation

mini_tasks.goal: Plan a simulator-only move from A to B around one obstacle.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Path plan, simulated clearance check, and safety status.

mini_tasks.goal: Plan a simulator-only pick-and-place route around two obstacles with a stop-on-uncertainty rule.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Route plan, obstacle clearance checks, stop condition, and no-hardware safety status.

mini_tasks.goal: Plan a simulator-only recovery action when the robot detects an unexpected obstacle mid-route.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Initial route, unexpected-obstacle detection, recovery plan, safety stop condition, and no-hardware status.
